mapper.select: SELECT notification_no AS notificationNo, receiver_id AS receiverId, sender_id AS senderId, notification_type AS notificationType, content, target_type AS targetType, target_no AS targetNo, is_read AS isRead, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS createdAt, DATE_FORMAT(read_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS readAt FROM notification WHERE receiver_id = #{receiverId} ORDER BY notification_no DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification WHERE receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND is_read = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE notification SET is_read = 'Y', read_at = NOW() WHERE notification_no = #{notificationNo} AND receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND is_read = 'N'
UPDATE notification SET is_read = 'Y', read_at = NOW() WHERE receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND is_read = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification ( receiver_id, sender_id, notification_type, content, target_type, target_no ) SELECT user_id, #{senderId}, 'INQUIRY_ANSWERED', '문의하신 내용에 답변이 등록되었습니다.', 'INQUIRY', inquiry_no FROM inquiry WHERE inquiry_no = #{inquiryNo} ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE notification_no = notification_no

INSERT INTO notification ( receiver_id, sender_id, notification_type, content, target_type, target_no ) SELECT user_id, #{senderId}, #{notificationType}, #{content}, 'REVIEW', review_no FROM review WHERE review_no = #{reviewNo} ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE notification_no = notification_no

INSERT INTO notification ( receiver_id, sender_id, notification_type, content, target_type, target_no ) SELECT reporter_id, #{senderId}, #{notificationType}, #{content}, 'REPORT', report_no FROM report WHERE report_no = #{reportNo} ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE notification_no = notification_no

INSERT INTO notification ( receiver_id, sender_id, notification_type, content, target_type, target_no ) SELECT target_user_id, #{senderId}, 'REPORT_WARNING', '회원님의 콘텐츠에 대한 신고가 승인 처리되었습니다.', target_type, target_id FROM report WHERE report_no = #{reportNo} AND target_user_id IS NOT NULL AND target_user_id != reporter_id ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE notification_no = notification_no

INSERT INTO notification ( receiver_id, sender_id, notification_type, content, target_type, target_no ) SELECT user_id, #{senderId}, 'INQUIRY_RECEIVED', '새로운 문의가 접수되었습니다.', 'INQUIRY', #{inquiryNo} FROM member WHERE role = 'ADMIN' AND status = 'ACTIVE' ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE notification_no = notification_no

INSERT INTO notification ( receiver_id, sender_id, notification_type, content, target_type, target_no ) SELECT user_id, #{senderId}, 'REPORT_RECEIVED', '새로운 신고가 접수되었습니다.', 'REPORT', #{reportNo} FROM member WHERE role = 'ADMIN' AND status = 'ACTIVE' ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE notification_no = notification_no
